_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: PHP Generic
author: flyhost@gmail.com
description: Run generic PHP applications with built-in web server or artisan serve (Laravel). Supports Composer for dependency management.
startup: if [ -f /home/container/composer.json ]; then composer install --no-interaction --no-dev --optimize-autoloader 2>&1 || true; fi; php -S 0.0.0.0:{{SERVER_PORT}} -t /home/container/{{DOCUMENT_ROOT}}

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
apt-get update
apt-get install -y curl unzip git
curl -sS https://getcomposer.org/installer | php -- --install-dir=/usr/local/bin --filename=composer
if [ ! -z ${GIT_ADDRESS} ]; then
  git clone ${GIT_ADDRESS} /mnt/server
fi

variables.name: Document Root
variables.description: The directory to serve. Use '.' for root or 'public' for Laravel.

variables.name: Git Repository
variables.description: Optional: Git repository URL to clone during installation.

variables.name: User Upload
variables.description: If set to true, do not run git commands.
